headline: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Opens 120 Plus U.S. Connections Through Air Premia Deal
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) has entered an interline partnership with South Korea based Air Premia. The agreement connects Air Premia's routes from South Korea with Southwest's network to over 120 U.S. destinations on single itineraries. The partnership introduces new one ticket options for travelers flying between South Korea and U.S. cities that previously had limited direct access. Southwest Airlines, trading at $49.43, has tied this new interline deal to a business that already spans...
